title: Chhattisgarh: Sai Launches ‘Gaudham Yojana’ For Cattle Conservation, Lays Foundation For State’s First Cow Sanctuary
description: Chhattisgarh chief minister Vishnu Deo Sai on Saturday launched the “Gaudham Yojana” for cattle conservation at a programme held at Guru Ghasidas University in Bilaspur in the state.
